title: N8N SMS Filter Unknown Contacts Workflow
description: A ready-to-use n8n workflow template that filters incoming calls to identify unknown/unsaved contacts and sends SMS notifications only to numbers not in Google Contacts, eliminating manual exclusion lists.
gumroad_description:
You're tired of SMS notifications blowing up your phone for people already in your contacts.

This n8n workflow template automatically cross-references incoming call data against your Google Contacts and sends SMS alerts only for numbers that don't match — no manual blocklists, no maintenance.

Who this is for:
— Freelancers and solo operators screening inbound leads without missing real ones
— Small business owners who want smart call filtering without hiring a developer
— N8n users who want a working automation, not another tutorial to follow

What's inside:
— 9-node workflow (importable JSON) — plug it in, configure credentials, run it
— Google Contacts integration built in — your saved contacts are the filter
— SMS notification logic — only unknown numbers trigger an alert
— Step-by-step setup guide — no guesswork on connections or node order

No subscriptions. No code required. Works with your existing n8n instance.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
